目前已完成【幸福公寓】、【深夜便利店】、【幽灵海怪谈】、【虚拟之城怪谈】。
八岁的林玄被选中，参与规则怪谈。
作为道门传人的林玄发现，击杀诡异能获取功德，升级道门术法。
请神术、卜算术、道门雷法、障眼法……
当别国的参赛者还在苦苦挣扎之际。
幸福公寓中，林玄手持阴差哭丧棒，一棍一个小朋友。
深夜便利店中，道门雷法闪烁，林玄化身雷电法王。
幽灵海上，牛头马面自地府而来，威风凛凛。
通关之际。
马面：此去地府不知年，何日才能见上师？
牛头：上师，俺会在地府随时等候您的呼唤。
龙国观众们：林上师，您看我们现在修道还来得及吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f13c6f34d632fb72cbc04bb725764394","author":"冰咖半糖不加冰","author_id":"","book_id":"7260961632304499774","book_name":"八岁天师，在规则怪谈中请神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5481人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7260961724470133310","read_count":"5481","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"262190"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"128","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,搞笑轻松,无后宫,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7966067ba8bc3c874d18661ba0913901~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448306&x-signature=uLLEoBmJ0Wop3gcVtnYqg8uqeBs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2905348101122215","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.591608e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191146D27843DD068BED59CE9B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4591,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6883},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7357343857703256857","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了！
全书看下来，剧情方面脑洞是很不错的里面很多剧情我之前看的怪谈都是没有的，也可能是这本书道士当主角比较新颖吧
所以我个人觉得整本书看下来也提供了我怪谈方面的新鲜感的（也有可能是我看的这类书比较少的原因🌷）
但是，可能是我个人对怪谈之类的比较倾向于有点烧脑的吧（毕竟太过烧脑的我表示不想动脑子）
所以这本书看下来就只能说对于我个人来说代入感不是很强，爽点也不是很强，虽然看下来没有什么毒点，但也没有什么特别出彩的地方。
最后就是感觉结局有点不适合，中间或许作者编好了剧情，结果突然不想写了，所以直接把结局提前安排了，所以有一种不适合的感觉，完结太突然了，但也不至于让我扣分就是了
总结，无cp，剧情不是太精彩也不毒，完结有点太快有些坑没有填，在此赠上我的五星好评，祝完结撒花🎉🎉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713016669,"group_id":"7260961632304499774","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"花开花落终有时，相逢相聚本无意。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7hCtMb0/uggOUmtNeYaY6k=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/04a2c68de043441eab6b5d062ca32d46~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791744&x-signature=j1ElRw0CXIYvr5lRFbCK9ohqZjc%3D","user_id":"434998166161196","user_name":"京久"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"434998166161196","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7260961632304499774","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈】+【国运】+【诡异】+【无女主】+【搞笑】+【爽文】
